info.name: Avalara AvaTax REST API
info.description:
The AvaTax REST API v2 is Avalara's enterprise tax service providing real-time sales tax, use tax, VAT, and GST calculations. It supports tax calculation for transactions, address validation, exemption certificate management, company and nexus configuration, and comprehensive tax content definitions across all US and international jurisdictions.

Contact Support:
 Name: Avalara Developer Relations
 Email: developer.relations@avalara.com

request.description: Creates a new tax transaction. This is the primary method for calculating tax on a sale, purchase, or other taxable event. The transaction can be committed immediately or saved as a temporary document.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Avalara Create a Refund for a Transaction

variable.description: (Required)

request.description: Creates a refund transaction based on an existing committed transaction. Supports full, partial, percentage, and tax-only refund types.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

variable.description: (Required) The company code identifying the company
(Required)

request.description: Adjusts a committed transaction by replacing it with a modified version. The original transaction is voided and a new adjusted transaction is created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

variable.description: (Required) The company code identifying the company
(Required)

request.description: Marks a transaction as committed, indicating it has been finalized and should be reported to tax authorities.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

variable.description: (Required) The company code identifying the company
(Required)

request.description: Voids an existing transaction, removing it from tax reporting. Only uncommitted or committed transactions can be voided.
